app.title: WorldCup Predictor Pro 2026
app.subtitle: Multi-agent football analysis — not betting advice
cli.api_test.title: API Connectivity Test
cli.api_test.primary_fail: Primary API-Football connection FAILED — check API_FOOTBALL_KEY.
cli.upcoming.source_placeholder: Data source: placeholder (set API_FOOTBALL_KEY for live data)
confidence.unavailable: Confidence unavailable — prediction model not yet active
prediction.pending: Analysis pending — awaiting data collection and model activation
risk.warning: Football outcomes are uncertain. This system provides analytical estimates only, not financial or betting advice.
risk.disclaimer: Past performance and statistical models do not guarantee future results. Never wager more than you can afford to lose.
cli.inspect.no_prediction: Final prediction: not generated in Phase 2
cli.inspect.no_betting: Betting recommendation: none — analytical data only
cli.predict.no_bet_true: TRUE — insufficient confidence or data quality
predict.no_bet_warning: No-bet recommended: data quality or confidence is too low for actionable analysis.
predict.lineup_warning: Official lineups not confirmed — prediction may change after lineups are published.
predict.missing_data_warning: Some data is missing ({fields}) — confidence reduced accordingly.
predict.analytical_disclaimer: Analytical prediction only. Not guaranteed. Not financial or betting advice. Outcomes remain uncertain.
predict.explanation.template: Analytical view for {match}: 1X2 leans {one_x_two}; O/U 2.5 leans {over_under}. Confidence {confidence}/100, risk {risk}.{tournament_context} This is not guaranteed and not betting advice.
predict.explanation.tournament_addon: Tournament context ({group}): match importance {importance}; home qualification {home_status}, away {away_status}.{rotation_note}{placeholder_note}
predict.explanation.rotation_risk_note: Rotation risk may reduce lineup strength.
reason.injuries_missing: Injury data unavailable — confidence reduced slightly.
cli.specialists.no_prediction: No final prediction in this view — analytical signals only
cli.audit.watch_only: Watch only / wait for more data
audit.disclaimer: This audit explains analytical reasoning only. Not guaranteed. Not financial or betting advice. Odds remain informational.
audit.watch_only_message: Watch only — wait for more data before treating this as a strong analytical edge.
cli.schedule.placeholder_warning: Development placeholder schedule — dates and teams unconfirmed.
cli.groups.placeholder: Placeholder group tables — not official or confirmed.
cli.groups.row: {rank}. {team} — P{played} W{won} D{drawn} L{lost} GD{gd} Pts{pts} ({status})
cli.next_window.note: This is analysis readiness only — not a betting recommendation.
cli.backtest.disclaimer: Historical performance does not guarantee future results. Evaluation and calibration only — not betting advice.
cli.backtest.demo_created: Demo CSV created automatically — illustrative sample data, not an official historical feed.
cli.backtest.footer: Backtest complete — use results to improve model weights, not as betting guidance.
cli.calibrate.disclaimer: Calibrated parameters do not guarantee future results. Evaluation and improvement only — not betting advice.
cli.calibrate.demo_data: Demo CSV — calibration is illustrative only.
cli.calibrate.footer: Calibration applied to reports/calibration/ — do not overtrust on small samples.
cli.import.api_key_required: API_FOOTBALL_KEY is required. Set it in .env to import real historical matches. No fake data was created.
cli.import.demo_separate: Demo data remains at data/historical/worldcup_sample.csv (separate from imported real data).
cli.import.disclaimer: Historical import for evaluation only — does not guarantee future results. Not betting advice.
cli.import.seasons_required: At least one --seasons value is required with --league-id.
cli.validate.disclaimer: Validation checks structure and completeness only. Does not modify CSV files. Not betting advice.
cli.validate.demo_created: Demo CSV created automatically for validation — illustrative sample only.
cli.validate.footer: Validation complete — apply repairs manually before trusting calibration on weak datasets.
cli.validate.critical_preflight: Data quality check failed — required columns or goals missing. Fix CSV before continuing.
cli.validate.low_health_preflight: Data quality warning — health score below 75. Results may be unreliable.
cli.validate.calibration_not_recommended: Calibration not recommended on this dataset.
cli.validate.blocked: Execution blocked due to critical data quality errors.
cli.report.disclaimer: Analytical report only — not betting advice. Model outputs are frozen; narrative explains existing signals only.
cli.report.disclaimer_short: Analytical narrative only — not betting advice. Predictions are not modified by this report.
cli.report.pipeline_failed: Report pipeline failed — insufficient data for this fixture.
cli.report.local.executive: Analytical view for {match}: model leans {x2} in 1X2 and {ou} for O/U 2.5 with confidence {confidence}/100. Outcomes are not guaranteed.
cli.report.local.executive_watch_only: Watch only for {match}: preliminary lean {x2} / {ou} at confidence {confidence}/100. Wait for more data before relying on this analysis.
cli.report.local.final: Balanced analytical lean: 1X2 {x2}, O/U 2.5 {ou}, halftime goals estimate {ht}. Informational only.
cli.report.local.final_watch_only: Watch only / wait for more data — confidence or data quality is below analysis-ready threshold.
cli.report.local.factor_fallback: Limited specialist consensus — rely on core form and data quality signals.
cli.report.local.tactical_fallback: Tactical read based on available profiles for {home} vs {away}; lineups may change.
cli.report.local.risk_watch_only: Analysis readiness is low — watch only until lineups, odds, and form data improve.
cli.report.local.risk_no_bet: No-bet flag is active — model withholds strong analytical edge.
cli.report.local.risk_fallback: Standard football variance and data gaps apply.
cli.report.local.low_data_quality: Data quality score is {score} — missing fields may limit reliability.
cli.report.local.limitations_fallback: Some intelligence fields unavailable in current data snapshot.
cli.report.local.market_available: Odds snapshot available for informational context only — not a betting recommendation.
cli.report.local.market_unavailable: No reliable odds snapshot — market context omitted.
cli.live_opening.not_found: No opening fixture found for this competition.
cli.live_opening.prediction_hint: Enough data for analytical prediction — run:
cli.live_opening.prediction_skipped: Prediction skipped — insufficient data quality for reliable analysis.
